action_mappings.assign_statement_to_case: assign statement line {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.release_statement_from_case: release statement line {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.attach_external_reference: attach external reference {} to reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.detach_external_reference: detach external reference {} from reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.engage_approver_for_reference: engage approver for external reference {} in reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.engage_approver_with_document: engage approver with supporting document {} for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.verify_evidence_with_approver: verify evidence for reconciliation case {} with approver {} using external reference {}
action_mappings.apply_coa_as_evidence: apply coa code {} as evidence for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.propose_statement_transaction_candidate: propose statement transaction {} as a transaction candidate for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.revoke_statement_transaction_candidate: revoke statement transaction {} as a transaction candidate for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.propose_mapping_rule_candidate: propose mapping rule {} as a rule candidate for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.revoke_mapping_rule_candidate: revoke mapping rule {} as a rule candidate for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.propose_counterparty_candidate: propose counterparty {} as a candidate for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.revoke_counterparty_candidate: revoke counterparty {} as a candidate for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.propose_exception_candidate: propose exception type {} as an exception candidate for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.revoke_exception_candidate: revoke exception type {} as an exception candidate for reconciliation case {}
action_mappings.validate_mapping_against_ledger_account: validate mapping rule {} for reconciliation case {} against ledger account {} using statement transaction {}
action_mappings.validate_mapping_with_counterparty_and_a: validate reconciliation case {} mapping with counterparty {} and adjustment code {} for ledger account {}
action_mappings.finalize_accounting_checks: finalize accounting checks for reconciliation case {} using statement transaction {} and mapping rule {}
action_mappings.escalate_to_reconciliation_team: escalate reconciliation case {} to reconciliation team {} using statement transaction {} and mapping rule {}
action_mappings.escalate_to_audit_team: escalate reconciliation case {} to audit team {} involving counterparty {} and exception type {}
action_mappings.record_formal_review_outcome: record formal review outcome for reconciliation case {} using statement transaction {} and mapping rule {}
action_mappings.reopen_evidence_steps: reopen evidence steps for reconciliation case {} linked to external reference {} with approver {}
action_mappings.require_additional_approval: require additional approval for reconciliation case {} linked to external reference {}
action_mappings.require_additional_approval_with_documen: require additional approval for reconciliation case {} using supporting document {}
action_mappings.confirm_coa_post_approval: confirm coa post-approval for reconciliation case {} with coa code {}
action_mappings.initialize_case_subtype_coa_link: initialize case subtype coa link for manual case {} with automated case {} and coa code {}
action_mappings.request_final_review: request final review for reconciliation case {} linked to external reference {} by approver {}
action_mappings.finalize_and_close_case_with_coa: finalize and close reconciliation case {} with coa code {}
action_mappings.finalize_and_close_case_after_review: finalize and close reconciliation case {} after review

action_mappings_indef.assign_statement_to_case: assign a statement line {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.release_statement_from_case: release a statement line {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.attach_external_reference: attach an external reference {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.detach_external_reference: detach an external reference {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.engage_approver_for_reference: engage approver for an external reference {} in a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.engage_approver_with_document: engage approver with a supporting document {} for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.verify_evidence_with_approver: verify evidence for a reconciliation case {} with an approver {} using an external reference {}
action_mappings_indef.apply_coa_as_evidence: apply a coa code {} as evidence for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.propose_statement_transaction_candidate: propose a statement transaction {} as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.revoke_statement_transaction_candidate: revoke a statement transaction {} as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.propose_mapping_rule_candidate: propose a mapping rule {} as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.revoke_mapping_rule_candidate: revoke a mapping rule {} as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.propose_counterparty_candidate: propose a counterparty {} as a candidate for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.revoke_counterparty_candidate: revoke a counterparty {} as a candidate for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.propose_exception_candidate: propose an exception type {} as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.revoke_exception_candidate: revoke an exception type {} as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.validate_mapping_against_ledger_account: validate a mapping rule {} for a reconciliation case {} against a ledger account {} using a statement transaction {}
action_mappings_indef.validate_mapping_with_counterparty_and_a: validate a reconciliation case {} mapping with a counterparty {} and an adjustment code {} for a ledger account {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_accounting_checks: finalize accounting checks for a reconciliation case {} using a statement transaction {} and a mapping rule {}
action_mappings_indef.escalate_to_reconciliation_team: escalate a reconciliation case {} to a reconciliation team {} using a statement transaction {} and a mapping rule {}
action_mappings_indef.escalate_to_audit_team: escalate a reconciliation case {} to an audit team {} involving a counterparty {} and an exception type {}
action_mappings_indef.record_formal_review_outcome: record formal review outcome for a reconciliation case {} using a statement transaction {} and a mapping rule {}
action_mappings_indef.reopen_evidence_steps: reopen evidence steps for a reconciliation case {} linked to an external reference {} with an approver {}
action_mappings_indef.require_additional_approval: require additional approval for a reconciliation case {} linked to an external reference {}
action_mappings_indef.require_additional_approval_with_documen: require additional approval for a reconciliation case {} using a supporting document {}
action_mappings_indef.confirm_coa_post_approval: confirm coa post-approval for a reconciliation case {} with a coa code {}
action_mappings_indef.initialize_case_subtype_coa_link: initialize case subtype coa link for a manual case {} with an automated case {} and a coa code {}
action_mappings_indef.request_final_review: request final review for a reconciliation case {} linked to an external reference {} by an approver {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_and_close_case: finalize and close a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_and_close_case_with_coa: finalize and close a reconciliation case {} with a coa code {}
action_mappings_indef.finalize_and_close_case_after_review: finalize and close a reconciliation case {} after review

predicate_mappings.case_assigned_statement: the case {} is assigned to the statement line {}
predicate_mappings.case_has_assigned_statement: the case {} has an assigned statement
predicate_mappings.case_approver_engaged: the case approver is engaged with {}
predicate_mappings.case_proposed_coa: {} has a proposed course of action {}
predicate_mappings.case_final_review_flag: the case final review flag is set for {}
predicate_mappings.ledger_account_available: {} is available in the ledger account
predicate_mappings.statement_transaction_available: {} is available in the statement transaction
predicate_mappings.mapping_rule_available: {} is available in the mapping rule
predicate_mappings.external_reference_available: {} is available as an external reference
predicate_mappings.supporting_document_available: {} is available as a supporting document
predicate_mappings.coa_code_available: {} is available as a coa code
predicate_mappings.adjustment_code_available: {} is available as an adjustment code
predicate_mappings.exception_type_available: {} is available as an exception type
predicate_mappings.case_statement_candidate: {} is a candidate for the case statement {}
predicate_mappings.case_ledger_candidate: {} is a candidate for the ledger account {}
predicate_mappings.case_transaction_eligible: {} is eligible for the statement transaction {}
predicate_mappings.case_rule_eligible: {} is eligible for the mapping rule {}
predicate_mappings.case_adjustment_candidate: {} is a candidate for adjustment with code {}
predicate_mappings.case_exception_eligible: {} is eligible for an exception of type {}
predicate_mappings.case_role_assignment: {} is assigned to the organizational role {}
predicate_mappings.case_coa_reconciled: {} is reconciled with the coa code {}
predicate_mappings.case_external_reference_link: {} is linked to the external reference {}
predicate_mappings.case_coa_proposal_relation: {} has a coa proposal relation with {}

open_reconciliation_case.description: open reconciliation case a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only open reconciliation case a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case A exists and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I open reconciliation case a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A exists

assign_statement_to_case.description: assign a statement line B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign a statement line B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and B is unassigned and A is a candidate for the case statement B
I can only assign a statement line B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case A has an assigned statement
effects: Once I assign a statement line B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A is assigned to the statement line B and the case A has an assigned statement
Once I assign a statement line B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is unassigned

release_statement_from_case.description: release a statement line B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only release a statement line B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A is assigned to the statement line B
I can only release a statement line B from a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that accounting is validated for A and it is not the case that escalation is recorded for A
effects: Once I release a statement line B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is unassigned

Once I release a statement line B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A is assigned to the statement line B and it is not the case anymore that the case A has an assigned statement and it is not the case anymore that the case approver is engaged with A and it is not the case anymore that the evidence for A is verified and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case anymore that A has completed post validation and it is not the case anymore that A has a manual review flag

attach_external_reference.description: attach an external reference B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only attach an external reference B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and B is available as an external reference
effects: Once I attach an external reference B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is linked to the external reference B
Once I attach an external reference B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an external reference

detach_external_reference.description: detach an external reference B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only detach an external reference B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is linked to the external reference B
effects: Once I detach an external reference B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available as an external reference
Once I detach an external reference B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the external reference B

engage_approver_for_reference.description: engage approver for an external reference B in a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only engage approver for an external reference B in a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and the case A has an assigned statement and A is linked to the external reference B
I can only engage approver for an external reference B in a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case approver is engaged with A
effects: Once I engage approver for an external reference B in a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case approver is engaged with A

engage_approver_with_document.description: engage approver with a supporting document B for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only engage approver with a supporting document B for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and the case A has an assigned statement and B is available as a supporting document
I can only engage approver with a supporting document B for a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case approver is engaged with A
effects: Once I engage approver with a supporting document B for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case approver is engaged with A and A has an escalation flag
Once I engage approver with a supporting document B for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a supporting document

verify_evidence_with_approver.description: verify evidence for a reconciliation case A with an approver C using an external reference B
preconditions: I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A with an approver C using an external reference B if it is the case that the case approver is engaged with A and the case A has an assigned statement and A is linked to the external reference B and C is available as an approver
I can only verify evidence for a reconciliation case A with an approver C using an external reference B if it is not the case that the evidence for A is verified
effects: Once I verify evidence for a reconciliation case A with an approver C using an external reference B, it is the case that the evidence for A is verified
Once I verify evidence for a reconciliation case A with an approver C using an external reference B, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag

apply_coa_as_evidence.description: apply a coa code B as evidence for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only apply a coa code B as evidence for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A has an assigned statement and B is applied to A
I can only apply a coa code B as evidence for a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the evidence for A is verified
effects: Once I apply a coa code B as evidence for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the evidence for A is verified
Once I apply a coa code B as evidence for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag

propose_statement_transaction_candidate.description: propose a statement transaction B as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only propose a statement transaction B as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and B is available in the statement transaction and A is eligible for the statement transaction B
effects: Once I propose a statement transaction B as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is a transaction candidate for A
Once I propose a statement transaction B as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the statement transaction

revoke_statement_transaction_candidate.description: revoke a statement transaction B as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only revoke a statement transaction B as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that B is a transaction candidate for A
effects: Once I revoke a statement transaction B as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available in the statement transaction
Once I revoke a statement transaction B as a transaction candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is a transaction candidate for A

propose_mapping_rule_candidate.description: propose a mapping rule B as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only propose a mapping rule B as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and B is available in the mapping rule and A is eligible for the mapping rule B
effects: Once I propose a mapping rule B as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is a rule candidate for A
Once I propose a mapping rule B as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the mapping rule

revoke_mapping_rule_candidate.description: revoke a mapping rule B as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only revoke a mapping rule B as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that B is a rule candidate for A
effects: Once I revoke a mapping rule B as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available in the mapping rule
Once I revoke a mapping rule B as a rule candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is a rule candidate for A

propose_counterparty_candidate.description: propose a counterparty B as a candidate for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only propose a counterparty B as a candidate for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and B is available as a counterparty and A is eligible for the counterparty B
effects: Once I propose a counterparty B as a candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is a counterparty candidate for A
Once I propose a counterparty B as a candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a counterparty

revoke_counterparty_candidate.description: revoke a counterparty B as a candidate for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only revoke a counterparty B as a candidate for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that B is a counterparty candidate for A
effects: Once I revoke a counterparty B as a candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available as a counterparty
Once I revoke a counterparty B as a candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is a counterparty candidate for A

propose_exception_candidate.description: propose an exception type B as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only propose an exception type B as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and B is available as an exception type and A is eligible for an exception of type B
effects: Once I propose an exception type B as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is an exception candidate for A
Once I propose an exception type B as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an exception type

revoke_exception_candidate.description: revoke an exception type B as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only revoke an exception type B as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that B is an exception candidate for A
effects: Once I revoke an exception type B as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that B is available as an exception type
Once I revoke an exception type B as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that B is an exception candidate for A

validate_mapping_against_ledger_account.description: validate a mapping rule D for a reconciliation case A against a ledger account B using a statement transaction C
preconditions: I can only validate a mapping rule D for a reconciliation case A against a ledger account B using a statement transaction C if it is the case that the case A has an assigned statement and C is a transaction candidate for A and D is a rule candidate for A and B is available in the ledger account and A is a candidate for the ledger account B
I can only validate a mapping rule D for a reconciliation case A against a ledger account B using a statement transaction C if it is not the case that accounting is validated for A
effects: Once I validate a mapping rule D for a reconciliation case A against a ledger account B using a statement transaction C, it is the case that B is validated for A and accounting is validated for A
Once I validate a mapping rule D for a reconciliation case A against a ledger account B using a statement transaction C, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the ledger account

validate_mapping_with_counterparty_and_a.description: validate a reconciliation case A mapping with a counterparty C and an adjustment code D for a ledger account B
preconditions: I can only validate a reconciliation case A mapping with a counterparty C and an adjustment code D for a ledger account B if it is the case that the case A has an assigned statement and C is a counterparty candidate for A and D is available as an adjustment code and B is available in the ledger account and A is a candidate for the ledger account B and A is a candidate for adjustment with code D
I can only validate a reconciliation case A mapping with a counterparty C and an adjustment code D for a ledger account B if it is not the case that accounting is validated for A
effects: Once I validate a reconciliation case A mapping with a counterparty C and an adjustment code D for a ledger account B, it is the case that B is validated for A and accounting is validated for A and A has a manual review flag and A has an escalation flag

Once I validate a reconciliation case A mapping with a counterparty C and an adjustment code D for a ledger account B, it is not the case anymore that B is available in the ledger account and it is not the case anymore that D is available as an adjustment code

finalize_accounting_checks.description: finalize accounting checks for a reconciliation case A using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C
preconditions: I can only finalize accounting checks for a reconciliation case A using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C if it is the case that accounting is validated for A and A has a manual review flag and B is a transaction candidate for A and C is a rule candidate for A
effects: Once I finalize accounting checks for a reconciliation case A using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C, it is not the case anymore that A has a manual review flag and it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag

escalate_to_reconciliation_team.description: escalate a reconciliation case A to a reconciliation team D using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C
preconditions: I can only escalate a reconciliation case A to a reconciliation team D using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C if it is the case that the evidence for A is verified and accounting is validated for A and B is a transaction candidate for A and C is a rule candidate for A and A is assigned to the organizational role D

I can only escalate a reconciliation case A to a reconciliation team D using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C if it is not the case that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case that escalation is recorded for A
effects: Once I escalate a reconciliation case A to a reconciliation team D using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C, it is the case that escalation is recorded for A

escalate_to_audit_team.description: escalate a reconciliation case A to an audit team D involving a counterparty B and an exception type C
preconditions: I can only escalate a reconciliation case A to an audit team D involving a counterparty B and an exception type C if it is the case that the evidence for A is verified and accounting is validated for A and B is a counterparty candidate for A and C is an exception candidate for A and A is assigned to the organizational role D
I can only escalate a reconciliation case A to an audit team D involving a counterparty B and an exception type C if it is not the case that escalation is recorded for A
effects: Once I escalate a reconciliation case A to an audit team D involving a counterparty B and an exception type C, it is the case that escalation is recorded for A and A has an escalation flag

record_formal_review_outcome.description: record formal review outcome for a reconciliation case A using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C
preconditions: I can only record formal review outcome for a reconciliation case A using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C if it is the case that escalation is recorded for A and A has an escalation flag and B is a transaction candidate for A and C is a rule candidate for A
effects: Once I record formal review outcome for a reconciliation case A using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C, it is the case that A has completed post validation

Once I record formal review outcome for a reconciliation case A using a statement transaction B and a mapping rule C, it is not the case anymore that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case anymore that the evidence for A is verified and it is not the case anymore that A has a manual review flag

reopen_evidence_steps.description: reopen evidence steps for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B with an approver C
preconditions: I can only reopen evidence steps for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B with an approver C if it is the case that A has completed post validation and escalation is recorded for A and the case A has an assigned statement and A is linked to the external reference B and C is available as an approver
I can only reopen evidence steps for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B with an approver C if it is not the case that the evidence for A is verified
effects: Once I reopen evidence steps for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B with an approver C, it is the case that the evidence for A is verified

require_additional_approval.description: require additional approval for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B
preconditions: I can only require additional approval for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B if it is the case that escalation is recorded for A and the evidence for A is verified and A is linked to the external reference B

I can only require additional approval for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B if it is not the case that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case that approval is recorded for A
effects: Once I require additional approval for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B, it is the case that approval is recorded for A

require_additional_approval_with_documen.description: require additional approval for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B
preconditions: I can only require additional approval for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B if it is the case that escalation is recorded for A and the evidence for A is verified and B is available as a supporting document

I can only require additional approval for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B if it is not the case that A has an escalation flag and it is not the case that approval is recorded for A
effects: Once I require additional approval for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B, it is the case that approval is recorded for A
Once I require additional approval for a reconciliation case A using a supporting document B, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a supporting document

confirm_coa_post_approval.description: confirm coa post approval for a reconciliation case A with a coa code B
preconditions: I can only confirm coa post approval for a reconciliation case A with a coa code B if it is the case that approval is recorded for A and B is available as a coa code and A has a coa proposal relation with B
effects: Once I confirm coa post approval for a reconciliation case A with a coa code B, it is the case that A is reconciled with the coa code B
Once I confirm coa post approval for a reconciliation case A with a coa code B, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a coa code

initialize_case_subtype_coa_link.description: initialize case subtype coa link for a manual case A with an automated case B and a coa code C
preconditions: I can only initialize case subtype coa link for a manual case A with an automated case B and a coa code C if it is the case that the case A exists and A is undergoing a manual precheck and A has a proposed course of action C and B is reconciled with the coa code C
I can only initialize case subtype coa link for a manual case A with an automated case B and a coa code C if it is not the case that C is applied to A
effects: Once I initialize case subtype coa link for a manual case A with an automated case B and a coa code C, it is the case that C is applied to A

request_final_review.description: request final review for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B by an approver C
preconditions: I can only request final review for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B by an approver C if it is the case that the case A exists and A is undergoing a manual precheck and the evidence for A is verified and approval is recorded for A and A is linked to the external reference B and C is available as an approver
I can only request final review for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B by an approver C if it is not the case that the case final review flag is set for A
effects: Once I request final review for a reconciliation case A linked to an external reference B by an approver C, it is the case that the case final review flag is set for A

finalize_and_close_case.description: finalize and close a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only finalize and close a reconciliation case A if it is the case that A is undergoing an automated precheck and the case A exists and the case A has an assigned statement and accounting is validated for A and escalation is recorded for A and approval is recorded for A and the evidence for A is verified
I can only finalize and close a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize and close a reconciliation case A, it is the case that A is closed

finalize_and_close_case_with_coa.description: finalize and close a reconciliation case A with a coa code B
preconditions: I can only finalize and close a reconciliation case A with a coa code B if it is the case that A is undergoing a manual precheck and the case A exists and the case A has an assigned statement and accounting is validated for A and escalation is recorded for A and approval is recorded for A and the evidence for A is verified and B is applied to A
I can only finalize and close a reconciliation case A with a coa code B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize and close a reconciliation case A with a coa code B, it is the case that A is closed

finalize_and_close_case_after_review.description: finalize and close a reconciliation case A after review
preconditions: I can only finalize and close a reconciliation case A after review if it is the case that A is undergoing a manual precheck and the case A exists and the case A has an assigned statement and accounting is validated for A and escalation is recorded for A and approval is recorded for A and the evidence for A is verified and the case final review flag is set for A
I can only finalize and close a reconciliation case A after review if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize and close a reconciliation case A after review, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_statement_to_case: assign statement line {?statement_line} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.release_statement_from_case: release statement line {?statement_line} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.attach_external_reference: attach external reference {?external_reference} to reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.detach_external_reference: detach external reference {?external_reference} from reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.engage_approver_for_reference: engage approver for external reference {?external_reference} in reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.engage_approver_with_document: engage approver with supporting document {?supporting_document} for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.verify_evidence_with_approver: verify evidence for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} with approver {?approver} using external reference {?external_reference}
action_nl_templates.apply_coa_as_evidence: apply coa code {?coa_code} as evidence for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.propose_statement_transaction_candidate: propose statement transaction {?statement_transaction} as a transaction candidate for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.revoke_statement_transaction_candidate: revoke statement transaction {?statement_transaction} as a transaction candidate for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates.propose_mapping_rule_candidate: propose mapping rule {?mapping_rule} as a rule candidate for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}

action_nl_templates.reopen_evidence_steps: reopen evidence steps for reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} linked to external reference {?external_reference} with approver {?approver}

action_nl_templates_indef.revoke_counterparty_candidate: revoke a counterparty {?counterparty} as a candidate for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.propose_exception_candidate: propose an exception type {?exception_type} as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.revoke_exception_candidate: revoke an exception type {?exception_type} as an exception candidate for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_accounting_checks: finalize accounting checks for a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} using a statement transaction {?statement_transaction} and a mapping rule {?mapping_rule}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_to_reconciliation_team: escalate a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} to a reconciliation team {?reconciliation_team} using a statement transaction {?statement_transaction} and a mapping rule {?mapping_rule}
action_nl_templates_indef.escalate_to_audit_team: escalate a reconciliation case {?reconciliation_case} to an audit team {?audit_team} involving a counterparty {?counterparty} and an exception type {?exception_type}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a reconciliation case or a statement line or a ledger account or a mapping rule or a statement transaction or a counterparty or a external reference or a supporting document or a coa code or a approver or a adjustment code or a exception type or a organizational role is also a object
Everything that is a reconciliation team or a audit team is also a organizational role
Everything that is a automated case or a manual case is also a reconciliation case
